nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 巴拿马
nodes.summary: 巴拿马是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联296种鸟类，包括乔科穴䳍、Black guan、茶臉鶉等296种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 哥斯达黎加
nodes.summary: 哥斯达黎加是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联215种鸟类，包括Black guan、茶臉鶉、Spot-bellied bobwhite等215种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Volcano junco
nodes.summary: Volcano junco（Volcano junco，学名 Junco vulcani），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于哥斯达黎加、巴拿马，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括气候变化。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica and Panama

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica and Panama

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits paramo grasslands, humid montane scrublands, and similar open landscapes such as overgrown pastures. Sources are in general agreement on its elevational range

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits paramo grasslands, humid montane scrublands, and similar open landscapes such as overgrown pastures. Sources are in general agreement on its elevational range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The only identified threat is potential degradation of its habitat as a result of climate change. One source states that the species is "common to frequent" and another says it is "fairly common"
